_description: Mixed pattern with diagnostic dilemma. R-factor ~3.5 (mixed zone). Young female with autoimmune markers and possible overlap syndrome. Expected: hepatitic path (mixed defaults), dilemma YES, complex case, MDT review.
_expected_path: GP_REFERRAL → EXTRACT → RED_FLAG(no) → TRIAGE → GP_LETTER → LFT_PATTERN(mixed→hepatitic) → HEPATITIC_INVESTIGATIONS → DILEMMA(yes) → MRI_BIOPSY → MDT_REVIEW → CONSULTANT_SIGNOFF → MONITORING(yes) → SURVEILLANCE
